title: Trip Support Hotels
description: Global hotel booking system with real-time availability and pricing.

content.overview: Following the success of the flight engine, Trip Support tasked us with rebuilding their hotel booking module to provide a world-class experience for travelers seeking accommodations.
content.challenge: Managing millions of hotel listings with real-time updates on availability and pricing required a highly scalable and reliable infrastructure. The system also needed to support complex booking rules and cancellations.
content.solution: We built a scalable hotel booking platform using a distributed system architecture, integrated with major hotel aggregators, and implemented an advanced caching layer to ensure rapid response times.
content.results: The new hotel system successfully handled high traffic volumes and provided a seamless booking experience, contributing to a significant growth in Trip Support's overall travel revenue.
